display.purpose: Landing page hero headline only. Fluid clamp sizing.

title.purpose: Card titles, dialog headers, section subheads.

label.purpose: Tags, badges, metadata, small UI elements.

motion.name: ease-accelerate
motion.purpose: Elements leaving with urgency — exit animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Used for CTAs, save, create, confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #5B6CFF; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4E5EF7; transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(91, 108, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Used for cancel, dismiss, non-primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: #929390; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(232, 231, 230, 0.06); color: #e8e7e6; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(91, 108, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Knowledge Card
components.description: Knowledge resource item in grid/list. Click to open reader.
components.html:
How QR Phishing Attacks Target Developers
blog.security.com
QR phishing — or 'quishing' — is on the rise. Attackers embed malicious QR codes in emails and PDFs.
Reference2h ago
components.css: .ds-card-knowledge { position: relative; display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; background: #282828; border: 1px solid rgba(232, 231, 230, 0.14); border-radius: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-knowledge:hover { border-color: rgba(232, 231, 230, 0.25); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0px 0.5px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0px 0px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-card-knowledge:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(91, 108, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-card-accent { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 3px; background: #38bdf8; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding-left: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #e8e7e6; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-domain { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.5); margin-top: 2px; } .ds-card-summary { font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.7); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 8px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-card-tag { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 8px; background: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.15); border-radius: 9999px; color: #38bdf8; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-card-time { font-size: 0.6875rem; color: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.4); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text input field. Used for search, forms, edit-in-place.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: #1e1e1e; color: #e8e7e6; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid rgba(232, 231, 230, 0.10); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.5); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #5B6CFF; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(91, 108, 255, 0.3); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Active state uses accent tint.
components.html: Knowledge
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: #929390; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(232, 231, 230, 0.06); color: #e8e7e6; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(91, 108, 255, 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Knowledge Tag
components.description: Knowledge type badge. Colored by type accent.
components.html: Reference
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; background: rgba(146, 147, 144, 0.15); color: #38bdf8; opacity: 0.7; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: A calm, intentional workspace where knowledge is the material. The design never competes with the content — surfaces recede, typography leads, motion explains. Every pixel serves the goal of frictionless capture and effortless retrieval. The system is dark-first, nearly monochrome, with a single accent (#5B6CFF) that drives all interactive elements. Section-specific hues are reserved for icons, badges, and indicators — never for surfaces or text. Color is used as a rare resource, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, warm neutrals — canvas is warm near-black (#1b1b1b), not cold blue-gray
Single accent — #5B6CFF drives all interactive elements, never exceeds 5% screen coverage
Three-panel layout — folder tree | resource list | reader panel, the core paradigm
Shared element transitions — cards morph into readers, search results into detail views
Typography-first — Inter at every size, hierarchy via weight and spacing, not decorative type
Motion explains state — entrance, exit, selection, morph; never decoration

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary accent (#5B6CFF) covers ≤5% of any given screen. If accent feels everywhere, remove it.

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: Neutrals are tinted toward the accent hue (270°) at low chroma. Default-tinting toward warm or cool is prohibited.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Text Rule
rules.body: Emphasis is communicated through weight and size. background-clip: text with gradient is decorative and prohibited.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only UI font. No display/body pairing. Monospace is for code alone.

rules.name: The Fixed Rem Rule
rules.body: Product UI uses fixed rem values for all type. Fluid clamp() is reserved for the landing page hero only.

rules.name: The 68ch Rule
rules.body: Prose body text never exceeds 68 characters per line. Data and compact UI may run denser.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction state or elevated hierarchy.

dos: Use a single accent (#5B6CFF) for all interactive elements. Keep it rare — ≤5% of any screen.
Use tonal layering (luminance steps) as the primary depth mechanism. Shadows support, they don't carry hierarchy.
Use shared layout transitions (layoutId) for morphing elements — card→reader, search→detail, tile→overlay.
Animate only transform and opacity. Never width, height, top, left.
Use Inter for everything. One family, multiple weights (400/500/600/700).
Respect prefers-reduced-motion — every animation has a zero-duration fallback.
Use the 8px spacing rhythm. 4px for micro-adjustments. No arbitrary values.
Show skeleton states for loading content, not spinners in the middle of content.
Design empty states that teach the interface, not nothing here.
donts: Use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px as a colored accent on cards).
Use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Emphasis via weight and size.
Use glassmorphism as default. Rare and purposeful, or nothing.
Use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Use identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text, repeated endlessly).
Use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section heading.
Use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Use display fonts for UI labels, buttons, or data.
Reinvent standard affordances — no custom scrollbars, weird form controls.
Use modal as first thought. Exhaust inline / progressive alternatives first.
Use bouncy animations or elastic springs. Ease-out-quart / quint / expo only.
Add decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
Create color for decoration. Justify every color with a functional role.
